panels.raw_text: Lily makes breakfast in the kitchen.
panels.expanded_prompt: Wide shot, full-body side view. A slender young woman stands at a kitchen counter, right hand cracking an egg into a ceramic bowl, left hand steadying the bowl, torso leaning slightly forward over the counter, weight on both feet. She wears a cream oversized knit sweater, beige linen trousers, and white socks; short brown bob, light skin. Kitchen with white cabinets, wooden countertop, herb pots on the windowsill, sheer white curtain. Soft warm morning sunlight from the side window. Clean storyboard-style digital illustration, soft ink outlines, flat-wash color fills, mild cel-shading, warm approachable palette.

panels.raw_text: Lily looks out the window quietly.
panels.expanded_prompt: Medium-wide shot, three-quarter profile, full upper body visible. A slender young woman stands beside a kitchen window, left hand resting flat on the wooden sill, right arm hanging relaxed, body turned toward the glass, head tilted slightly as she gazes at the outdoor greenery. She wears a cream oversized knit sweater and beige linen trousers; short brown bob, light skin. Sheer white curtain drifting softly, potted herbs on the sill, blurred outdoor greenery beyond. Warm morning light streaming through the window. Clean storyboard-style digital illustration, soft ink outlines, flat-wash color fills, mild cel-shading, warm approachable palette.

panels.raw_text: Lily sits down to eat with a book beside her.
panels.expanded_prompt: Medium shot, slight high angle showing full upper body plus the whole dining table surface. A slender young woman sits at a wooden dining table, spoon in her right hand lifted partway toward her mouth, left hand resting on the edge of an open book placed beside a ceramic plate; a white mug sits further along the table. She wears a cream oversized knit sweater; short brown bob, light skin. Wooden chair, apartment dining area, soft morning window light in the background. Clean storyboard-style digital illustration, soft ink outlines, flat-wash color fills, mild cel-shading, warm approachable palette.
